title: 네이버, AI 검색 엔진 '네이버 GPT' 출시
summary: 네이버가 자체 개발한 대규모 언어 모델 기반의 AI 검색 엔진을 서비스했습니다.
content: Naver launched its AI-powered search engine 'Naver GPT' to users. The new platform provides more accurate and contextual search results. The model was trained on extensive Korean language data. Users can access advanced features with a premium subscription. Early reviews highlight improved search relevance. Competitors are watching the launch closely. Naver invested heavily in AI research and development. The company plans to expand globally with this technology. User privacy concerns have been addressed with enhanced security. Integration with other Naver services is seamless. The launch represents significant progress in Korean AI capabilities.
